cards.back: A data flow model is a graphical representation of the flow of data through a system, showing the relationships between different components.
A behavioural model is a mathematical representation of the behaviour of a system, describing how it responds to inputs and changes over time.
A Petri Net is a type of behavioural model used to represent the flow of data and control flow in a system using nodes and transitions.
A State Machine is a behavioural model that represents a system's behaviour as a series of states and transitions between them.
A Data Flow Diagram is a graphical representation of the flow of data through a system, showing the input, processing, and output of data.
